ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the host's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the host account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the host account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "host_roles" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the host */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned to the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who owns the listing */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the listing */,
  "neighbourhood_group" TEXT /* Neighbourhood group where the listing is located */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Neighbourhood where the listing is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the listing */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the listing */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., Private room, Entire home/apt) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price per night */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for booking */,
  "maximum_nights" INTEGER /* Maximum number of nights allowed for booking */,
  "minimum_stay" INTEGER /* Minimum stay required for booking */,
  "maximum_guests" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests allowed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the listing */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities provided by the listing */,
  "house_rules" TEXT /* House rules for the listing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the listing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the listing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being reviewed */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who made the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the guest (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the guest account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the guest account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_calendar" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the booking calendar entry */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Availability of the listing on the given date */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the listing on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id", "date")
)
